title: Lei Shuo's Blog
subTitle: Welcome to my personal blog
script: <script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){var s=document.createElement('style');s.innerText='@keyframes f{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}} html,body{background:linear-gradient(-45deg,#ee7752,#e73c7e,#23a6d5,#23d5ab)!important;background-size:400% 400%!important;animation:f 15s ease infinite!important;min-height:100vh!important} .markdown-body,.side,.FileList{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.7)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3)} .Header,.footer{background:transparent!important;border:none!important} .toc-box{position:fixed;left:20px;top:80px;width:220px;max-height:80vh;overflow-y:auto;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);backdrop-filter:blur(5px);padding:15px;border-radius:10px;box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);z-index:99999} .toc-title{font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:10px;border-bottom:2px solid #e73c7e;padding-bottom:5px} .toc-box a{display:block;color:#444;text-decoration:none;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:6px;padding:6px;border-radius:4px;transition:0.2s} .toc-box a:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);color:#e73c7e;transform:translateX(5px)} @media(max-width:900px){.toc-box{display:none}}';document.head.appendChild(s);fetch('/blogBase.json').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{var c=document.createElement('div');c.className='toc-box';var t=document.createElement('div');t.className='toc-title';t.innerText='📚 文章导航';c.appendChild(t);Object.values(d).sort((a,b)=>b.id-a.id).forEach(p=>{var a=document.createElement('a');a.href=p.postUrl;a.innerText=p.postTitle;a.title=p.postTitle;c.appendChild(a)});document.body.appendChild(c)}).catch(e=>console.log('TOC Error:',e));});</script>
